systems.system_notes: Modular revision knee arthroplasty platform for complex reconstruction, instability, and bone-loss management.

trays.tray_notes: Official Smith+Nephew materials support dedicated LEGION revision instrumentation and linked surgical technique resources.

components.component_notes: Official product materials describe the revision femoral component family within the LEGION system.
Official product materials describe the modular tibial tray and fixation construct.
Official product materials describe the constrained insert family used in revision reconstruction.
Official product materials describe modular stem extensions used in the revision construct.
Official product materials describe modular augments for revision bone-defect management.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The public LEGION revision materials define the revision construct but do not expose a public implant code table in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper brochure, IFU, or operative-technique pass is required for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
